good: Staff Christmas party at external venue
Off-site team lunch at a restaurant
BBQ for Honorary Park Rangers or Bush care group
bad: Office morning tea on Council premises → 73512
73511.vs_note: 73511 = off-site OR alcohol present OR social/recreational function OR elaborate meal. 73512 = on-site light refreshments only at a working meeting, no alcohol, no social element.

good: Morning tea biscuits at team meeting in office
Sandwiches at working lunch on Council premises
73512.vs_note: 73512 = on-site light refreshments at a working meeting only. No alcohol. No social function. Off-site or alcohol = 73511.

good: Minor ad-hoc maintenance job, total contract value $8,000
bad: Single invoice $22,000 — check total contract value, likely 73212
73211.vs_note: The threshold is the TOTAL CONTRACT VALUE, not the individual invoice amount. A $3,000 invoice on a $50,000 contract must still be 73212.

73212.vs_note: If total contract value is unknown, confirm before coding. Default to 73212 if there is any doubt the total exceeds $20k.

good: Hays Recruitment agency labour supply invoice
Labour-hire company invoice for temp workers
bad: Directly engaged casual staff via payroll → 71114
73214.vs_note: 73214 = engaged through an employment agency (they invoice LCC). 71113 = Council directly employs and pays the person via payroll. Agency invoice = always 73214.

good: Temp Council employee paid directly via payroll
Fixed-term Council employee at permanent rates — no agency involved
71113.vs_note: 71113 = Council is the employer, person is on Council payroll. 73214 = third-party agency supplies the person. If there is an agency invoice, it is 73214.

73542.vs_note: 73542 = professional body membership only (an industry association you join). 73433 = licence fees, blue cards, DigSafe — compliance obligations you must hold to perform work.

73433.vs_note: 73433 = regulatory compliance fees, licences, blue cards, DigSafe. 73542 = professional body memberships only.

bad: University course fees reimbursed to staff member → 73545
Internal LCC venue hire for training → 7B611
73544.vs_note: 73544 = training and development courses. 73545 = university or TAFE course fees reimbursed to a specific staff member under the Study Assistance Policy.

good: Griffith University semester fees reimbursed to staff
QUT course fees reimbursed under study assistance
73545.vs_note: 73545 = uni/TAFE course fees reimbursed to staff only. All other training and development → 73544.

73123.vs_note: 73123 = general maintenance (repairs, pest, fire, AC, painters, plumbers). 73124 = security-specific only (patrols, alarms, access control, lock fitting).

73124.vs_note: 73124 = security services only. Everything else maintenance-related → 73123.

good: Council car parking fees in SEQ
73531.vs_note: 73531 = SEQ taxi, Cabcharge, parking only. Toll charges are a separate account (73535). Interstate travel including taxi goes to 73533.

73535.vs_note: 73535 = toll charges only. All taxi, Cabcharge, and parking → 73531.

good: Queensland Audit Office annual financial audit fee
External auditor invoice for financial statements audit
73112.vs_note: 73112 = external financial reporting audit ONLY (annual financial statements). Every other type of audit or investigation → 73116.

73116.vs_note: 73116 = all audit and investigation except the annual financial reporting audit. When in doubt use 73116.

good: Internal meeting room at LCC facility
7B611.vs_note: 7B611 = all internal LCC venues (LEC, Logan Metro, Council buildings). External commercial venues → 73521. Even when an LCC room is hired for training, use 7B611 not 73544.

73521.vs_note: 73521 = external commercial property leases and rentals only. All internal LCC venues → 7B611.

good: Management consultant engaged to redesign branch structure (written report delivered)
Organisational change consultant producing recommendations report
bad: Contractor implementing a known IT system → 73211/73212
73601.vs_note: Consultancy requires ALL 4 elements: expert knowledge producing written recommendations + new concept/process + fixed period/rate + unsupervised. A contractor implementing a known outcome → 73211/73212.

73126.vs_note: 73126 = landscaping and mowing services. 73129 = greenwaste processing and disposal (what happens after the mowing).

73122.vs_note: 73122 = garbage/bin collection services. 73129 = greenwaste processing. 73130 = solid waste disposal to landfill.

good: Flight + hotel in Melbourne for conference
Rental car hire in Perth for site visit
bad: Meals during interstate trip → 73511 or 73512 (hospitality rules apply)
73533.vs_note: 73533 = interstate travel/accommodation only (within Australia, outside QLD). 73532 = intrastate (within QLD). Meals during any travel follow hospitality rules, NOT the travel account.

good: Cairns hotel for regional site visit
73532.vs_note: 73532 = all travel and accommodation within Queensland. Interstate (other Australian states) → 73533.

good: IPWEA Qld conference fee — registration only
73541.vs_note: 73541 = conference/seminar REGISTRATION FEES only. Travel, accommodation, and meals are separate accounts. Training courses → 73544.

good: Newspaper recruitment ad placed via HR
73551.vs_note: 73551 = recruitment advertising only (hiring personnel), coordinated via HR Services. 73552 = all other advertising, coordinated via Marketing & Communication.

good: Facebook ad campaign for park event
73552.vs_note: 73552 = all advertising that is NOT for recruitment. Must be coordinated via Marketing & Communication Branch. Promotional items/merchandise → 73553.

good: Services genuinely not fitting any other category
Specialist service with no matching account
73128.vs_note: 73128 is a LAST RESORT account. Before using it, check every other 731xx account. If a more specific account exists, use it. Common miscodings: pest control (73123), WHS (73125), electrical (73127).

73219.vs_note: 73219 = disposal of biosolids/sludge from Council treatment facilities only. General waste → 73120/73130. Greenwaste → 73129.
